context: Tests whether the agent correctly constructs a --from-cache command with the right cache prefix, preferred airport codes, and all required positional arguments.

checklist.name: from-cache flag with correct prefix
checklist.description: Uses --from-cache cache_KMQY_KEDC_2026-03-16 (the correct prefix without _charts.json or _llm.json suffix)

checklist.name: Nashville as KMQY
checklist.description: Uses KMQY as the origin airport code

checklist.name: Austin as KEDC
checklist.description: Uses KEDC as the destination airport code

checklist.name: All positional args present
checklist.description: Includes all positional arguments (KMQY KEDC 2026-03-16 15:00 12000) even though rebuilding from cache

checklist.name: No --cache flag
checklist.description: Does not include --cache (unnecessary when rebuilding from existing cache)

checklist.name: Explains no API calls
checklist.description: Explanation mentions that --from-cache bypasses fetching and API calls
